classes.title: Knight Talents
classes.description: Centered Tier 1 launch row branching into Chivalric Defender, Blade of Justice, and Crusading Zeal.

nodes.description: Passive - Increases critical strike chance with swords by 10% and ignores 8% of enemy armor.
Active - Dash forward, striking for 120% weapon damage and increasing your next attack's damage by 20%. (30s CD)
Passive - Every 3rd consecutive sword attack deals 20% bonus damage.
Passive - Increases armor by 10% and reduces critical hit damage taken by 15%.
Active - Strike an enemy for 60% weapon damage and stun them for 2 seconds. (30s CD)
Passive - Reduces stamina lost on block by 15% and restores 1% health on each successful block.
Passive - Increases strength by 10% and movement speed by 5%.
Active - Strike for 100% weapon damage, granting allies within 10 yards 10% increased damage for 8 seconds. (45s CD)
Passive - Grants nearby allies 5% increased strength and 3% movement speed.
Passive - After successfully parrying an attack, your next strike deals 60% bonus damage and ignores 20% of the target's armor.
Active - Unleash 3 rapid strikes dealing 80% weapon damage each over 2 seconds. (45s CD)
Passive - Each consecutive hit on the same target increases your sword damage by 5%, stacking up to 3 times. Resets on target switch.
Passive - When an attack bypasses your block, reduce its damage by 25%. Successful blocks also restore an additional 2% health.
Active - Deal 140% weapon damage and grant nearby allies 8% increased damage for 10 seconds. (60s CD)
Passive - After blocking, gain a barrier equal to 8% of your max health for 7 seconds. Does not stack.
Passive - Melee attacks have a 15% chance to deal 40% weapon damage as bonus holy damage.
Active - Charge a target, dealing 130% weapon damage and reducing their damage output by 15% for 7 seconds. (60s CD)
Passive - After being hit, gain 10% movement speed and 5% increased damage for 5 seconds. (Internal 15s CD)
Active - Chain strikes between up to 3 enemies, dealing 130% weapon damage to each. (90s CD)
Passive - Critical hits with swords grant 10% increased damage for 6 seconds, stacking up to 2 times.
Active - Apply a ward to an ally, absorbing damage equal to 15% of your max health for 8 seconds. (90s CD)
Passive - Increases max health by 12% and reduces crowd control duration by 20%.
Active - Rally allies, increasing their movement speed by 10% and damage by 10% for 10 seconds. (90s CD)
Passive - Allies within 10 yards take 8% less damage. You deal 5% more damage for each nearby ally, up to 3 allies.
Capstone Active - Deliver a devastating strike dealing 300% weapon damage. Targets below 25% health are crippled, reducing their movement speed by 20% for 4 seconds. (150s CD)
Capstone Active - When you drop below 30% health, automatically gain a shield absorbing 25% of your max health for 10 seconds. (120s CD)
Capstone Active - Lead a crusade charge, dealing 200% weapon damage in a line and granting allies along the path 15% increased damage and 10% movement speed for 8 seconds. (180s CD)

classes.title: Rogue Talents
classes.description: Rogue talent masteries organized into three knight-style branches.

nodes.description: Passive - Increases critical strike chance with daggers by 10%. Critical strikes instantly trigger one tick of your active toxins.
Passive - Dagger attacks apply a bio-toxin dealing 4% weapon damage per second for 5 seconds.

Active - Slip into stealth for up to 6 seconds. Movement speed increases by 20%. Your next attack from stealth deals 40% increased weapon damage and applies an Overdose stack. Taking direct damage breaks stealth. (60s CD)
Passive - Toxin stacks now deal 15% more damage, stack up to 3 times, and each stack shreds 5% of the target's armor.
Passive - Toxins last 25% longer. Striking an enemy with 3 toxin stacks restores 1% of your health per hit.
Active - Deliver a brutal finishing strike dealing 140% weapon damage. Consumes all toxin stacks on the target to deal an immediate 30% additional damage per stack. (36s CD)
Active - Inject a specialized compound dealing 160% weapon damage. For the next 6 seconds, the target bleeds for an additional 10% of all direct damage they receive from you. (75s CD)
Passive - You are healed for 50% of your poison's damage.

Capstone Active - Deliver a corrupted strike dealing 250% weapon damage and applying a deadly contagion that deals 60% weapon damage over 8 seconds. If the target dies while this is active, it detonates in a 5-yard radius, applying max toxin stacks to all nearby enemies. (135s CD)
Passive - Increases attack speed with dual-wielded weapons by 10%.
Passive - Your attacks have a 25% chance to cause a bleed on an enemy that lasts 8 seconds. You deal 15% more damage to enemies who are bleeding.
Active - A vicious cross-slash dealing 120% weapon damage that opens a bleeding wound, dealing 20% weapon damage over 4 seconds. (24s CD)
Passive - Each consecutive hit, attack, or ability within 2 seconds increases movement speed by 5%, stacking up to 4 times.
Passive - Each consecutive hit, attack, or ability within 2 seconds grants 5% attack speed, stacking up to 4 times.
Active - A flurry of 3 strikes dealing 80% weapon damage each. If the target is bleeding, each strike extends the bleed duration by 1 second. (36s CD)
Active - A low, sweeping strike dealing 100% weapon damage, slowing the target by 50% for 4 seconds, and interrupting current ability casts. (45s CD)
Passive - You become immune to slowing effects. There is a 50% chance if you drop below 10% HP that a smoke bomb will deploy and automatically put you into stealth.

Capstone Active - Spin with both weapons dealing 220% weapon damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Applies the Sunder Strike bleed to all targets hit and instantly resets the cooldown of Saber Slash. (105s CD)
Passive - Increases stealth effectiveness by 15% and movement speed while stealthed by 10%.
Passive - Increases movement speed by 8% and reduces damage taken from the first hit after exiting stealth by 20% on full rank.

Active - A two-stage phase technique. First Cast: activate optical camouflage to enter stealth for up to 8 seconds, increasing your movement speed by 20%. Taking direct damage breaks this state. Second Cast: while stealthed, target an enemy within 10 yards and reactivate the ability to instantly teleport directly behind them. You materialize with a strike that deals 130% weapon damage and ends the stealth effect. (45s CD begins after stealth is broken or consumed)
Passive - Exiting stealth or using Strike from the Void leaves behind an untargetable holographic clone for 3 seconds. The clone mimics your basic attacks for 15% of their original damage.
Passive - Stealth abilities have 20% reduced cooldowns. Re-entering stealth instantly cleanses one active debuff.
Active - Strike an enemy's back for 150% weapon damage. If used within 2 seconds of teleporting or exiting stealth, this attack is guaranteed to critically strike. (30s CD)
Active - Ambush from the shadows, dealing 180% weapon damage and silencing the target for 3 seconds. (60s CD)
Passive - While out of stealth, reduce damage taken by 8%. Consecutive hits against you shorten your next stealth reentry cooldown by 2 seconds each.

Capstone Active - Overclock your camouflage tech for 10 seconds. During this window, Strike from the Void has no cooldown and instantly triggers the second-cast teleport without needing to enter stealth first. Each successful teleport leaves behind a Phantom Decoy that immediately detonates, dealing 100% weapon damage to enemies in a small radius. (180s CD)

classes.title: Dreadnought Talents
classes.description: Dreadnought talent masteries organized into three knight-style branches.

nodes.description: Passive - Increases damage with two-handed weapons by 10% on full rank.
Passive - Two-handed attacks have a 15% chance to splash, dealing 25% weapon damage to one nearby enemy on full rank.
Active - Strike for 140% weapon damage, reducing the target's armor by 20% for 8 seconds. (30s CD)
Passive - Each consecutive melee hit increases damage by 5%, stacking up to 4 times on full rank.
Passive - After hitting an enemy, gain 5% increased strength for 7 seconds, stacking up to 2 times on full rank.
Active - A massive swing dealing 200% weapon damage to a target and 60% to enemies within 5 yards. (45s CD)
Active - Crush a target for 180% weapon damage, stunning them for 2 seconds. (25s CD)
Passive - Critical hits with two-handed weapons ignore 20% armor and deal 10% increased damage on full rank.
Capstone Active - Unleash a colossal strike dealing 380% weapon damage and knocking back all enemies within 6 yards. Resets Pulverize's cooldown. (120s CD)
Passive - Increases armor by 15% and max health by 8% on full rank.
Passive - Reduces physical damage taken by 6% and magical damage taken by 4% on full rank.
Active - Slam the ground, dealing 80% weapon damage to enemies within 8 yards and slowing them by 40% for 4 seconds. (20s CD)
Passive - Reduces stun and crowd control duration by 25% on full rank.
Passive - After blocking, gain 10% increased armor for 6 seconds on full rank.
Active - Reduce all incoming damage by 40% for 8 seconds. (90s CD)
Active - Taunt all enemies within 10 yards and gain 20% damage reduction for 8 seconds. (90s CD)
Passive - Increases armor efficiency by 15% and reduces critical damage taken by 10% on full rank.
Capstone Active - Become immovable for 8 seconds, reflecting 25% of all damage taken back to attackers, gaining 30% damage reduction, and generating greatly increased threat. (180s CD)
Passive - Increases stamina by 10% and reduces damage taken during charges by 20% on full rank.
Passive - After charging, gain 12% increased movement speed and 8% increased damage for 6 seconds on full rank.
Active - Charge an enemy, dealing 120% weapon damage and rooting them for 2 seconds. (30s CD)
Passive - Charges deal 20% increased damage and reduce the target's armor by 10% for 5 seconds on impact on full rank.
Passive - After being hit, gain 8% increased movement speed for 6 seconds and 5% damage reduction on full rank.
Active - Stomp the ground, dealing 100% weapon damage to enemies within 10 yards and interrupting their current action. (40s CD)
Active - Stomp to reduce the armor of all enemies within 10 yards by 25% for 8 seconds. (50s CD)
Passive - Reduces charge cooldown by 20%. Each charge builds Fortress stacks granting 5% armor per stack for 8 seconds, up to 2 stacks on full rank.

Capstone Active - Charge through all enemies in a line, dealing 220% weapon damage to each, becoming immune to crowd control for 6 seconds, and reducing all hit enemies' armor by 15% for 8 seconds. (120s CD)

classes.title: Viking Talents
classes.description: Viking talent masteries organized into three knight-style branches.

nodes.description: Passive - Dealing damage generates 8% additional rage on full rank.
Passive - Increases rage generation by 10% and slows rage decay by 10% on full rank.
Active - A wild attack dealing 140% weapon damage and generating 10 rage. (10s CD)
Passive - Critical hits deal 20% bonus damage and restore 5 rage on full rank.
Passive - After each hit, gain 5% increased attack speed for 3 seconds, stacking up to 3 times on full rank.
Active - Increase attack speed by 20% and damage by 10% for 8 seconds. (25s CD)
Active - Charge forward, dealing 160% weapon damage, generating 15 rage, and knocking enemies aside. (20s CD)
Passive - Rage decays 20% slower. At maximum rage, gain 10% increased critical chance on full rank.
Capstone Active - Enter a frenzied state, dealing 5 rapid strikes of 100% weapon damage over 3 seconds. Each hit generates 5 rage. (40s CD)
Passive - Increases max health by 10% and reduces damage taken by 5% on full rank.
Passive - Regenerates 1% health every 5 seconds. This doubles to 2% when below 40% health on full rank.
Active - Taunt all nearby enemies and gain 15% damage reduction for 8 seconds. (25s CD)
Passive - Rage decays 20% slower. Regenerate 1% health for every 10 rage spent on full rank.
Passive - After being hit, gain 8% damage reduction for 4 seconds. (Internal 8s CD)
Active - Reflect 40% of melee damage taken back to attackers for 6 seconds. (30s CD)
Active - Roar to heal yourself for 15% health and taunt all enemies within 10 yards. (25s CD)
Passive - Reduces magical damage taken by 12%. Reduces physical damage taken by an additional 5% when below 50% health on full rank.
Capstone Active - Immediately restore 10% health, gain 35% damage reduction, and increase all healing received by 25% for 8 seconds. (90s CD)
Passive - Increases damage with two-handed weapons by 12% on full rank.
Passive - Increases strength by 10% and critical strike damage by 10% on full rank.
Active - Strike up to 3 nearby enemies for 120% weapon damage each. (12s CD)
Passive - After an enemy blocks or parries your attack, your next hit deals 35% bonus damage on full rank.
Passive - Two-handed attacks have a 15% chance to hit an additional nearby enemy for 50% weapon damage on full rank.
Active - Spin to deal 110% weapon damage to all enemies within 8 yards. (15s CD)
Active - Strike for 170% weapon damage, shattering the target's armor by 30% for 8 seconds. (20s CD)
Passive - Increases critical strike chance with two-handed weapons by 10%. Critical hits deal 15% bonus damage on full rank.
Capstone Active - Smash the ground, dealing 300% weapon damage in a 10-yard cone, stunning all hit enemies for 2 seconds, and reducing their armor by 20% for 8 seconds. (45s CD)

classes.title: Jester Talents
classes.description: Jester talent masteries organized into three knight-style branches.

nodes.description: Passive - Increases attack speed with daggers by 10% and critical strike chance by 5% on full rank.
Passive - Dagger attacks have a 10% chance to apply a random debuff for 3 seconds on full rank.
Active - Strike for 130% weapon damage with a 20% chance to confuse the enemy for 3 seconds. (12s CD)
Passive - After parrying an attack, gain 15% increased critical strike chance for 5 seconds on full rank.
Passive - Critical hits always apply a random debuff lasting 4 seconds on full rank.
Active - Deliver 3 rapid strikes dealing 80% weapon damage each over 2 seconds. (15s CD)
Active - Jest with blades dealing 160% weapon damage and disorienting the target for 3 seconds. (20s CD)
Passive - Critical hits restore 2% stamina and increase your critical chance by 5% for 4 seconds on full rank.
Capstone Active - Deliver a mocking strike dealing 260% weapon damage, applying a 20% damage reduction debuff for 8 seconds, and confusing all nearby enemies for 3 seconds. (45s CD)
Passive - Increases movement speed by 8% and reduces damage taken while moving by 5% on full rank.
Passive - Increases agility by 10% and reduces the stamina cost of movement abilities by 15% on full rank.
Active - Flip toward an enemy dealing 120% weapon damage and evading the next incoming attack within 2 seconds. (12s CD)
Passive - After being hit, gain 15% movement speed and 10% evasion for 4 seconds on full rank.
Passive - After parrying, gain 15% movement speed for 5 seconds and your next attack deals 15% bonus damage on full rank.
Active - Spin to strike all nearby enemies for 100% weapon damage. (15s CD)
Active - Flip over an enemy, dealing 140% weapon damage and repositioning behind them. (18s CD)
Passive - Reduces damage taken while moving by an additional 10%. Each successful evasion restores 1% stamina on full rank.
Capstone Active - Perform a chaotic dance, becoming untargetable for 4 seconds and dealing 160% weapon damage to all nearby enemies during this time. (45s CD)
Passive - Reduces cooldowns of all active abilities by 10% on full rank.
Passive - Increases the duration of all debuffs you apply by 15% and debuffs deal 5% additional damage on full rank.
Active - Strike for 110% weapon damage and reduce the target's accuracy by 15% for 6 seconds. (12s CD)
Passive - Melee attacks have a 15% chance to confuse an enemy, causing them to attack a random nearby target for 3 seconds on full rank.
Passive - After being hit, apply a debuff to the attacker reducing their movement speed by 15% for 5 seconds on full rank.
Active - Drop a trap that causes enemies who walk over it to slip and stun for 2 seconds. (20s CD)
Active - Set a trap that deals 150% weapon damage and confuses triggered enemies for 3 seconds. (20s CD)
Passive - Your debuffs have a 15% chance to spread to one nearby enemy when applied on full rank.
Capstone Active - Unleash a chaotic performance dealing 200% weapon damage to all enemies within 10 yards, confusing them for 5 seconds, and reducing their damage output by 15%. (50s CD)

classes.title: Samurai Talents
classes.description: Samurai talent masteries organized into three knight-style branches.

nodes.description: Passive - Increases critical strike chance with katanas by 10% on full rank.
Passive - Increases katana damage by 8%. Every 4th hit triggers a free Quick Draw at 50% damage on full rank.
Active - Unsheathe your katana for 150% weapon damage with 25% increased critical damage. (12s CD)
Passive - Critical hits with katanas deal 20% bonus damage and reduce Quick Draw's cooldown by 2 seconds on full rank.
Passive - After any hit, increase the next attack's critical chance by 15% on full rank.
Active - A sweeping strike dealing 130% weapon damage to up to 3 enemies in an arc. (15s CD)
Active - Draw and strike for 170% weapon damage, immediately resetting Quick Draw's cooldown. (20s CD)
Passive - Ignores 15% of enemy armor with katanas. Critical hits cause the target to bleed for 10% weapon damage over 4 seconds on full rank.
Capstone Active - Deliver a perfect strike dealing 320% weapon damage, resetting Quick Draw's cooldown, and granting 10% increased katana damage for 10 seconds. (45s CD)
Passive - Increases parry chance by 12% and armor by 8% on full rank.
Passive - Increases max health by 8% and reduces damage taken from attacks you successfully parry by an additional 15% on full rank.
Active - Parry the next incoming attack, reducing its damage by 50% and countering for 100% weapon damage. (15s CD)
Passive - Reduces damage taken by 12% while above 50% health on full rank.
Passive - After blocking, gain 10% damage reduction for 5 seconds and restore 1% health on full rank.
Active - After parrying, immediately strike for 150% weapon damage and reduce the attacker's damage by 15% for 6 seconds. (18s CD)
Active - Ward yourself, absorbing damage equal to 20% of your max health for 8 seconds. (25s CD)
Passive - Reduces crowd control duration by 20%. Each successful parry restores 2% health on full rank.
Capstone Active - Gain 30% damage reduction and full crowd control immunity for 8 seconds. During this time, all parries automatically trigger a 100% weapon damage counter-attack. (90s CD)
Passive - Increases movement speed by 8% and dodge chance by 5% on full rank.
Passive - Increases attack speed by 8% and reduces the cooldown of dashes and charges by 10% on full rank.
Active - Dash to an enemy dealing 120% weapon damage and increasing your next attack's speed by 25%. (12s CD)
Passive - Moving increases your attack speed by 10% for 3 seconds after you stop moving on full rank.
Passive - After parrying, gain 20% movement speed for 5 seconds and deal 10% bonus damage on your next hit on full rank.
Active - Spin with your katana, dealing 110% weapon damage to all enemies within 8 yards. (15s CD)
Active - Dash up to 3 times in rapid succession, dealing 130% weapon damage per dash. (20s CD)
Passive - Increases damage by 12% when no allies are nearby. Each hit builds a stack granting 2% critical chance, up to 5 stacks, resetting on damage taken on full rank.
Capstone Active - Unleash a flurry of 5 katana strikes, dealing 90% weapon damage each to the target and all nearby enemies, and resetting Flash of Steel's cooldown. (45s CD)

classes.title: Monk Talents
classes.description: Monk talent masteries organized into three knight-style branches.

nodes.description: Passive - Increases unarmed attack speed by 12% on full rank.
Passive - Increases critical chance with unarmed attacks by 8%. Critical hits generate 5% more energy on full rank.
Active - Deliver a rapid punch dealing 130% weapon damage and increasing the next attack's damage by 20%. (10s CD)
Passive - Critical hits restore 2% health and increase damage by 10% for 5 seconds on full rank.
Passive - After hitting, gain 8% increased strength for 5 seconds, stacking up to 2 times on full rank.
Active - Unleash 4 rapid punches dealing 80% weapon damage each over 2 seconds. (15s CD)
Active - Assault with rapid claw strikes, dealing 4 hits of 40% weapon damage each over 2 seconds, applying a bleed. (18s CD)
Passive - Unarmed attacks ignore 12% armor. After 5 consecutive unarmed hits, the 6th deals 30% bonus damage on full rank.
Capstone Active - Strike with both fists dealing 260% weapon damage, stunning the target for 3 seconds, and increasing your attack speed by 20% for 8 seconds. (40s CD)
Passive - Increases dodge chance by 10% and movement speed by 8% on full rank.
Passive - Increases evasion by 8% and reduces the stamina cost of movement abilities by 10% on full rank.
Active - Spin to deal 100% weapon damage to all enemies within 8 yards. (15s CD)
Passive - After parrying an attack, gain 20% movement speed for 4 seconds on full rank.
Passive - Increases parry chance by 10%. Successful parries reduce incoming damage from that attacker by 10% for 4 seconds on full rank.
Active - Leap to an enemy, dealing 120% weapon damage and knocking them back 5 yards. (12s CD)
Active - Spin in the air, dealing 140% weapon damage and evading all incoming attacks during the animation. (18s CD)
Passive - Movement and leap abilities deal 10% bonus damage. Reduces damage taken while airborne or mid-dash on full rank.
Capstone Active - Gain 25% dodge chance and deal 160% weapon damage to all nearby enemies over 6 seconds. Each evasion triggered during this time restores 2% health. (45s CD)
Passive - Increases stamina and strength by 8% on full rank.
Passive - Increases healing received by 8% and passively regenerates 0.5% health every 3 seconds on full rank.
Active - Strike for 120% weapon damage, reducing the target's damage output by 12% for 6 seconds. (12s CD)
Passive - Melee attacks have a 15% chance to restore 5% health on full rank.
Passive - After being hit, gain 10% increased damage for 5 seconds. (Internal 8s CD)
Active - A high kick dealing 150% weapon damage and interrupting the target's current action. (15s CD)
Active - Exhale a burst of force dealing 160% weapon damage in a cone. (18s CD)
Passive - Critical hits restore 3% health and reduce all active cooldowns by 1 second on full rank.
Capstone Active - Channel inner peace, gaining 20% damage reduction for 8 seconds and dealing 220% weapon damage to a target. Heals for 15% of your max health over the duration. (50s CD)

classes.title: Shield Hero Talents
classes.description: Shield Hero talent masteries organized into three knight-style branches.

nodes.description: Passive - Increases damage with shield-based attacks by 15% on full rank.
Passive - Shield attacks ignore 12% armor and have a 10% chance to knock the target back on full rank.
Active - Charge an enemy, dealing 120% weapon damage and knocking them back. (12s CD)
Passive - Shield attacks have a 20% chance to stun the target for 2 seconds on full rank.
Passive - After any shield hit, increase the damage of your next shield attack by 20% on full rank.
Active - Slam your shield into a target dealing 150% weapon damage and reducing their armor by 20% for 8 seconds. (15s CD)
Active - Bash for 170% weapon damage and apply a bleed dealing 20% weapon damage per second for 5 seconds. (18s CD)
Passive - Increases critical chance with shield attacks by 12%. Critical shield hits reduce all active cooldowns by 1 second on full rank.

Capstone Active - Hurl your shield in a 10-yard line, dealing 260% weapon damage to all enemies hit, stunning them for 3 seconds, and returning to your hand resetting Shield Charge's cooldown. (40s CD)
Passive - Increases armor by 12% and max health by 8% on full rank.
Passive - Increases block effectiveness by 12% and reduces stamina lost on block by 10% on full rank.
Active - Bash an enemy with your shield, dealing 80% weapon damage and taunting them for 5 seconds. (12s CD)
Passive - Blocking an attack grants a barrier absorbing 10% of your max health for 6 seconds on full rank.
Passive - After blocking, gain 10% increased stamina regeneration and 5% damage reduction for 5 seconds on full rank.
Active - Taunt all enemies within 10 yards and gain 15% damage reduction for 8 seconds. (20s CD)
Active - Emit an aura reducing ally damage taken by 10% within 15 yards for 10 seconds. (25s CD)
Passive - Reduces crowd control duration by 20%. Blocking restores 2% health on full rank.
Capstone Active - Gain a shield absorbing 35% of your max health in damage, reflect 20% of all damage taken back to attackers, and greatly increase threat generation for 10 seconds. (90s CD)
Passive - Increases your stamina by 10% and reduces damage taken by allies within 10 yards by 5% on full rank.
Passive - Increases healing received by allies within 10 yards by 8% and your own healing received by 5% on full rank.
Active - Throw your shield, dealing 100% weapon damage to a target and bouncing to 2 nearby enemies. (15s CD)
Passive - Your melee attacks grant allies within 5 yards 8% increased healing received for 5 seconds on full rank.
Passive - After an ally is hit, gain 15% increased movement speed and 5% damage reduction for 5 seconds on full rank.
Active - Raise your shield, granting allies within 10 yards a barrier absorbing 10% of their max health for 6 seconds. (20s CD)
Active - Shield a single ally, absorbing damage equal to 20% of their max health for 8 seconds. (20s CD)
Passive - Linked allies within 10 yards share 8% of your armor value and 5% of your block chance on full rank.
Capstone Active - Create a protective barrier reducing damage to all allies within 15 yards by 25% for 10 seconds and dealing 160% weapon damage to all nearby enemies on activation. (60s CD)
